title: Email request
subtitle: Ask for something clearly by email.
overview: Ask for something clearly by email.
A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: Could you send me the file again?
你能再把文件发给我吗？
I need it for the meeting tomorrow.
Could you send me the file again?
你能再把文件发给我吗？

items.en: Could you send me the file again?
items.zh: 你能再把文件发给我吗？

items.en: I need it for the meeting tomorrow.
Could you send me the file again?
items.zh: 你能再把文件发给我吗？

items.en: This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Could you send me the file again?
lines.zh: 你能再把文件发给我吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I need it for the meeting tomorrow.

items.en: Could you send me the file again?
items.zh: 你能再把文件发给我吗？

items.en: I need it for the meeting tomorrow.
Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
